description_long: This is a wooden mailbox mounted on a tall, sturdy frame with two vertical posts and a pitched roof. The mailbox features a rectangular mail slot on the front panel, which is accentuated by a dark trim. The posts are capped with decorative pointed finials, adding a touch of classic design. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the mailbox a rustic and natural appearance. The mailbox is elevated well above the ground, making it easily accessible for mail delivery. There are no visible identification markings or mail flag present.
description: A tall, rustic wooden mailbox with a pitched roof, decorative post caps, and a front mail slot.
description_view_0: The mailbox is seen from the side, showing the sloped roof and the solid wooden construction of the posts and box.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the pitched roof and the depth of the mailbox, with the post structure clearly visible.
description_view_2: The front view displays the rectangular mail slot with dark trim and the symmetrical design of the posts and roof.
description_view_3: Another angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the roof and post details from the opposite side.
